title: Trump releases UFO files
description: President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth released dozens of previously classified files on alleged UFO sightings and alien life Friday.

title: Pentagon Releases New UFO Records; Do They Prove Alien Life Exists?
description: The US Pentagon has released 160 classified UFO-related records including military videos and intelligence assessments reigniting public debate on extraterrestrial life Despite detailed accounts of anomalous phenomena experts maintain the files do not offer definitive proof of alien existence

title: 'Underwhelming but Historic': How the Public Reacted to the Pentagon's Long-Awaited UFO Files Release
description: The Pentagon's release of UFO files has sparked global debate, mixing excitement and scepticism. While lacking definitive proof of aliens, it marks a shift in government transparency on unexplained phenomena.

title: Are Aliens Real? US Declassifies Hundreds of Decades-Long UFO Files
description: The US Department of Defense has released 162 documents, photos, and videos related to UFOs or UAPs that were previously classified.

title: HUGE! U.S. Government Releases MASSIVE TROVE of Declassified UFO FILES (Video)
